info.title: andyx
info.description: Buildersoft Andy X is a distributed messaging system. This system will empower developers to move into Event Driven Systems. Andy X is a multi-tenant system.

commands.name: authorize
commands.description: Manage api keys and secrets for tenants, products and components

options.name: --issued-for
options.description: Enter the name of the client you would like to grant access (Producer or Subscription)

options.name: --expire-date
options.description: Expire date, date when the secret is valid, if is not set the default value is 2 years from this moment.

options.name: --create
options.description: Create or read Component Tokens, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --revoke
options.description: Revoke the given key, key should have value to be able to revoke a key

options.name: --expire-date
options.description: Expire date, date when the secret is valid, if is not set the default value is 2 years from this moment.

options.name: --create
options.description: Create or read Product Tokens, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --revoke
options.description: Revoke the given key, key should have value to be able to revoke a key

options.name: --roles
options.description: Roles, by default two roles will be asign Consume and Produce

options.name: --expire-date
options.description: Expire date, date when the secret is valid, if is not set the default value is 2 years from this moment.

options.name: --create
options.description: Create or read Tenant Tokens, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --revoke
options.description: Revoke the given key, key should have value to be able to revoke a key

options.name: --settings
options.description: If his property is set, you will interact with product settings

options.name: --enable-topic-creation
options.description: Allow topic automatic creation from clients, default is 'true'

options.name: --enable-subscription-creation
options.description: Allow subscription automatic creation from clients, default is 'true'

options.name: --enable-producer-creation
options.description: Allow producers automatic creation from clients, default is 'true'

options.name: --enforce-schema-validation
options.description: Enforce Schema Validation for topics created in this component, default is 'false'

options.name: --create
options.description: Create or read Component, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --update
options.description: If this property is set it will update the product settings, make sure to update all settings you want to update

options.name: --url
options.description: Url of Andy X Node, default value is 'https://localhost:6541' (Required)

options.name: --username
options.description: Username of Andy X Node, default is 'admin'

options.name: --password
options.description: Password of Andy X Node, default is 'admin'

options.name: --type
options.description: Instance type, the default is 'Multiple' (Allowed values: Single, Multiple)

options.name: --create
options.description: Create or read Subscription, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --settings
options.description: If his property is set, you will interact with product settings

options.name: --create
options.description: Create or read Product, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --update
options.description: If this property is set it will update the product settings, make sure to update all settings you want to update

commands.name: retention
commands.description: Manage life time of data at tenants, products and components

options.name: --type
options.description: Retention Policy Type, default is SOFT_TTL. In case of update type can not change (Allowed values: SOFT_TTL, HARD_TTL)

options.name: --ttl
options.description: Time to live in minutes, default value is 43800 (one month)

options.name: --create
options.description: Create a retention policy for tenant, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --update
options.description: update a retention policy for tenant with given id, set is update

options.name: --delete
options.description: delete a retention policy for tenant with given id, set is delete

options.name: --type
options.description: Retention Policy Type, default is SOFT_TTL. In case of update type can not change (Allowed values: SOFT_TTL, HARD_TTL)

options.name: --ttl
options.description: Time to live in minutes, default value is 43800 (one month)

options.name: --create
options.description: Create a retention policy for tenant, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --update
options.description: update a retention policy for tenant with given id, set is update

options.name: --delete
options.description: delete a retention policy for tenant with given id, set is delete

options.name: --type
options.description: Retention Policy Type, default is SOFT_TTL. In case of update type can not change (Allowed values: SOFT_TTL, HARD_TTL)

options.name: --ttl
options.description: Time to live in minutes, default value is 43800 (one month)

options.name: --create
options.description: Create a retention policy for tenant, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --update
options.description: update a retention policy for tenant with given id, set is update

options.name: --delete
options.description: delete a retention policy for tenant with given id, set is delete

options.name: --type
options.description: Subscription type, the default is 'Unique' (Allowed values: Unique, Failover, Shared)

options.name: --mode
options.description: Subscription mode, the default value is 'NonResilient' (Allowed values: Resilient, NonResilient)

options.name: --initial-position
options.description: Initial Position for subscription, the default value is 'Latest' (Allowed values: Earliest, Latest)

options.name: --create
options.description: Create or read Subscription, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --settings
options.description: If his property is set, you will interact with tenant settings

options.name: --allow-product-creation
options.description: Allow product automatic creation from clients, default is 'true'

options.name: --enable-encryption
options.description: Enable encryption of data at rest and in motion, default is 'false'

options.name: --create
options.description: Create or read Tenant, unset is read, set is create

options.name: --update
options.description: If this property is set it will update the tenant settings, make sure to update all settings you want to update

options.name: --settings
options.description: If his property is set, you will interact with product settings

options.name: --topic-settings
options.description: Topic Settings, if this property is not set, the default values will be applied for this topic
